title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 392.110 - No contract for exclusive use of land
text:
392.110.  No contract for exclusive use of land. — No company shall have power to contract with any owner of land for the right to erect or maintain a telephone or telegraph line over his lands, to the exclusion of the lines of other companies organized under the provisions of sections 392.010 to 392.170.
(RSMo 1939 § 5328) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 4923; 1919 § 10134; 1909 § 3328
